summary: Iteration 21: Tested Phase 4-6 features (Certificates, Expiration Alerts, Analytics Dashboard). Backend: 23/25 tests passed (92%). Frontend: All 3 new pages load and function correctly with RTL Arabic support.

critical.issue: MISSING ENDPOINT - Frontend CertificatesPage.js calls this endpoint to populate 'Select Contract' dropdown when creating certificates, but endpoint does not exist
critical.impact: Cannot create certificates via UI - dropdown shows empty list

integration_issues.issue: Cannot select contract in modal - GET /api/certification-agreements returns 404
affected_selectors: Select dropdown in Issue Certificate modal

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select> - minor console warning from Emergent framework, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: ADD missing GET /api/certification-agreements endpoint - should return list of signed agreements for admin to create certificates
critical_code_review_comments: Certificate endpoints (GET /api/certificates, GET /api/certificates/stats, POST /api/certificates, GET /api/certificates/{id}, PUT /api/certificates/{id}/status, GET /api/certificates/{id}/pdf) all properly implemented
Public certificate verification (GET /api/public/verify/{cert_number}) works without authentication
Expiration alerts (GET /api/alerts/expiring) correctly categorizes alerts into critical/warning/info
Analytics dashboard (GET /api/dashboard/analytics) provides comprehensive metrics including conversion funnel, revenue, and audit stats
All pages have proper RTL Arabic support with bilingual text

success_rate.backend: 92% (23/25 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no test data)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 pages load and display correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4-6 features (Certificates, Alerts, Analytics) are functional. Main issue: Missing GET /api/certification-agreements endpoint blocks certificate creation via UI. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_certificates_alerts_analytics.py can be reused. Existing data: 0 certificates, 4 info alerts (upcoming audits), 10 scheduled audits, 13 proposals, 6 contracts.

issues: Select Contract dropdown empty due to missing API

elements_found: Stats cards (4: Total, Critical, Warning, Info)

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - No actual emails sent (SMTP not configured)
